settings.title: Explore the fabrics behind ZODA — engineered for performance, comfort and sustainability.
settings.lede: Every ZODA garment starts with a fabric story. From BCI cotton blends to recycled nylons, each material is selected for how it performs, how it feels, and how lightly it treads.

settings.name: ZENCOT™
settings.tagline: Luxurious BCI cotton and elastane blend for exceptional breathability and soft feel.
settings.hero_title: ZENCOT™: Performance and Sustainability in Perfect Harmony
settings.description: ZENCOT™ is a premium fabric blend of BCI-certified cotton and elastane, delivering all-day comfort, breathability and performance—designed for athletes who value both function and environmental impact.
settings.performance:
FluidMotion™ 4-way stretch for full mobility
ZO-Fresh™ anti-odour treatment to stay fresh throughout wear
Retains shape and softness through repeated use
settings.sustainability:
Treated with COzTERRA: absorbs CO₂ and converts it to harmless minerals during washing
Each piece removes 16–41g of CO₂ over its lifetime
Contributes to a reduced carbon footprint without compromising performance
settings.community: Designed for athletes who expect more from their gear—offering the perfect blend of sustainability, comfort and performance.

settings.name: ZOENIX™
settings.tagline: Engineered from 100% Recycled Polyester (RPET), transforming post-consumer plastic bottles into premium athletic apparel.
settings.description: Made from 100% recycled polyester (RPET), ZOENIX™ turns post-consumer plastic bottles into high-performance fabric, designed to support both your training and your values.
settings.performance:
ZO-Dry™ wicks moisture away to keep you dry
ZO-Fresh™ keeps odour in check
FluidMotion™ 4-way stretch for agility and fit
settings.sustainability:
Reduces CO₂ emissions by 20.7% compared to virgin polyester
Built from 100% recycled materials using RPET, in alignment with ZODA's commitment to a circular economy.
settings.community: Experience unparalleled comfort and performance. Made for high-intensity apparels that function well in highly humid conditions.

settings.name: ZOENIXLITE™
settings.tagline: 86% Recycled Polyester and 12% Elastane — sustainable athletic excellence.
settings.description: ZOENIXLITE™ blends recycled polyester, elastane, and a fine-tuned structure to deliver maximum breathability and flexibility where it matters most.
settings.performance:
ZO-Dry™ moisture control
ZO-Vent mesh design for overall ventilation
ZO-Fresh™ for extended freshness
FluidMotion™ stretch for freedom in every movement
settings.sustainability: Made with recycled polyester, reducing CO₂ emissions and contributing to a circular economy
settings.community: Experience unparalleled comfort, performance and style while giving your best on your turf.

settings.name: RPSTRNG™
settings.tagline: Ultra-premium Recycled Nylon, Elastane and BCI Cotton blend.
settings.hero_title: RPSTRNG™: Engineered for Durability and Performance
settings.description: Experience the perfect balance of protection and performance with ZODA's RPSTRNG™ fabric — engineered to withstand the rigors of training while keeping you cool, dry and comfortable.
settings.performance:
Reinforced grid weave resists tearing
ZO-Dry™ wicks sweat efficiently
ZO-Vent™ and FluidMotion™ ensure comfort and freedom
ZO-Fresh™ keeps gear feeling clean
settings.sustainability: Built from regenerated nylon in alignment with ZODA's commitment to a circular economy.
settings.community: Two variants — Performance for hardcore training, Sprint for high-endurance running.

settings.name: AURAFORM™
settings.tagline: 80% Nylon and 20% Elastane — strength, stretch and recovery.
settings.description: AuraForm™ is performance-engineered using Zenith Tech™, delivering strategic support and flexibility.
settings.performance:
FluidMotion™ allows unrestricted movement and a sculpted fit
Zenith Tech™ maintains fabric shape wear after wear
ZO-Dry™ keeps you cool and dry
ZO-Fresh™ neutralises odour
settings.sustainability: Built from regenerated nylon in alignment with ZODA's commitment to a circular economy.
settings.community: AuraForm™ offers the perfect balance of compression and comfort.

settings.name: NYCURV™
settings.tagline: High-denier Nylon and advanced Elastane fibers.
settings.hero_title: NYCURV™: Engineered for Unwavering Support and Comfort
settings.description: NyCurv™ is a premium high-denier Nylon and Elastane blend designed for ultimate fit, shape retention, and confidence.
settings.performance:
Zenith Tech™ premium shape retention and compression
FluidMotion™ 4-way stretch
ZO-Dry™ moisture-wicking
ZO-Fresh™ anti-odour technology
settings.sustainability: Built from regenerated nylon in alignment with ZODA's commitment to a circular economy.
settings.community: Made for athletes who demand more from their activewear.

settings.name: NYX™
settings.tagline: NyCurv™ and Elastane blend — lightweight, technically advanced.
settings.description: NyX™ delivers targeted support and shape retention during your most intense workouts.
settings.performance:
NyCurv™ and elastane blend for firm yet flexible compression
FluidMotion™ allows full range of motion
ZO-Dry™ and ZO-Fresh™ ensure comfort and hygiene
Holds shape, wash after wash
settings.sustainability: Built from regenerated nylon in alignment with ZODA's commitment to a circular economy.
settings.community: High-performance compression that works as hard as you do.

settings.name: NYXLITE™
settings.tagline: Recycled polyester and elastane — breathability, stretch and recovery.
settings.hero_title: NYXLITE™: Cooling. Compressive. Ready for the Outdoors.
settings.description: Crafted for heat and high effort, NyXlite™ offers breathable support and structure in hot and humid training environments.
settings.performance:
Lightweight blend of NyCurv™ and elastane
Strategic compression zones for muscle support
ZO-Dry™ and ZO-Fresh™ keep you dry and odour-free
Perforated jacquard design enhances breathability
settings.sustainability: Built from regenerated nylon in alignment with ZODA's commitment to a circular economy.
settings.community: Designed for the outdoor athlete training in real conditions.
